scenarios.title: Desktop runtime doctor and diagnostics stay redacted
expectedOutcomes: Runtime status keeps ready/error compatibility
Doctor timeline is emitted
Diagnostics output redacts token-like values

scenarios.title: Cloud projection fences and event vocabulary are contract-backed
steps: Run cloud session projection contract tests
expectedOutcomes: Projected event types reduce into SessionView
Fence/checkpoint identity is exact
Automation envelopes are versioned

scenarios.title: Capability bundle dry-run blocks risky authority changes
steps: Run bundle manifest and planner tests
expectedOutcomes: Unsupported product modes fail closed
Dangerous MCP URL and stdio settings are blocked
User-owned resources are preserved

scenarios.title: Desktop pairing command handling remains explicit and redacted
scenarios.contract: pairing token, command, and audit policy
steps: Run desktop pairing service and transport tests
expectedOutcomes: Pairing commands require exact pairing state
Audit output stays remote-safe
Transport failures do not bypass local execution policy

scenarios.title: Workspace portability and sandbox lifecycle reject unsafe state
scenarios.contract: sandbox lifecycle and checkpoint portability policy
steps: Run runtime portability and checkpoint store tests
expectedOutcomes: Secret-looking mounts are rejected
Docker and Apple Container command plans are hardened and redacted
Blocked plans do not invoke a runner
Checkpoint writes are fenced
Portability proof remains deterministic

scenarios.title: Control-plane identity, permission, file-session, headless, and UI contracts fail closed
scenarios.contract: canonical identity, delegated permission inheritance, file-session scope, headless loopback, semantic UI status and action contract
prerequisites: Shared and desktop main tests available
steps: Run resource identity, permission inheritance, file-session, headless host, and semantic UI bridge tests
expectedOutcomes: Unknown identities do not fall back
Delegated read-only agents cannot regain write authority
File sessions deny traversal and sensitive paths
Headless check/status/doctor state is loopback-only and redacted
Semantic UI tools require tokens and execute only allowlisted redacted actions
